name: Sediment Core Chronology and Sampling Data from Stordalen_2
description: A dataset containing sediment sampling parameters and chronological data from a single location at Stordalen_2. The data includes sediment depth, sample thickness, and age estimates (Age, Age dated, Age unc) alongside material descriptions and laboratory labels. Spatial coordinates indicate a specific point in the Northern Hemisphere (Latitude 68.35, Longitude 19.05) at an elevation of 350 meters. The dataset includes a record for the sediment surface (0 cm) dated to 2003, though other temporal fields contain null values or lack valid date formats in the provided sample.
